extensionDescription.message: Detects suspicious Unicode in links and text: homoglyphs, invisibles and bidi controls.

popupNotAnalyzable.message: This tab is not an analyzable http/https page.

popupDomainOk.message: Current domain has no suspicious Unicode signals:

optHighlightLinks.message: Mark links whose domain is suspicious

optHighlightInvisible.message: Turn invisible/bidi characters into visible tags

optStrictMode.message: Strict mode: mark Unicode not included in the safe profile

optMarkFormatControlsEverywhere.message: Mark soft invisible controls even when isolated outside domains/emails

optShowBadges.message: Add a “Unicode” badge to suspicious links

allowedChars.message: Normal mode is Latin-focused: Latin letters and common European accents are allowed; suspicious Cyrillic/Greek/Armenian homoglyphs, risky Latin lookalikes in domains, invisible controls and mixed-script domains are flagged. Uncheck Greek only if you regularly use legitimate Greek text or domains.

warningIntro.message: This page uses a domain with suspicious Unicode characters, homoglyphs, invisible characters or mixed scripts.

warningContinue.message: Continue for 30 minutes at my own risk

contentLinkWarning.message: Unicode Guard: link with suspicious domain
